site.metaDescription: DecoRight: a see-it, buy-it 3D/AR product catalog for Malaysia.

home.itemCount: {count, plural, =0 {No items} one {# item} other {# items}}
home.emptyResults: No products match your filters. Try adjusting them.
home.browseByItemSubtitle: Most-stocked categories — swipe to see more.
home.tagline: See it in 3D · live with AR · then buy with confidence.
home.pickRoomSubtitle: Browse furniture by the room it goes in.
home.aiInspirationSubtitle: Soon: describe your space, get curated room ideas — every piece shoppable in 3D and AR.
home.heroSubtitle: Download FBX & GLB, preview in AR, and design the bathroom before it is built.
home.bannerArTitle: See It In Your Space. Then Buy It.
home.bannerArSub: Real products in AR — not concept renders.
home.bannerBuyTitle: Every Model Is a Real Product You Can Buy
home.bannerBuySub: Other libraries show renders you can’t purchase. DecoRight closes the loop.

room.pickItemSubtitle: Choose what you want to shop for in {room}.
room.allCategoriesSubtitle: Every kind of furniture that goes in {room} — including ones we haven't stocked yet.
room.empty: No item types in this room yet.

itemType.empty: No products in this category yet. Check back soon.

product.noImages: No photos uploaded yet — please check back soon.
product.arHintLine1: Tap the AR icon at the bottom-right of the model to preview this product life-size with your phone camera.
product.arHintLine2: iOS needs USDZ (Phase 3); Android Scene Viewer is live now.
product.insufficientCredit: Not enough credit — top up via WhatsApp.
product.arGateHint: AR is free for your first 3 products — after that, sign in (free) to keep viewing.
product.openOnPhone: Want to see it in your room? Open this page on your phone.

category.empty: No products in this category yet. Check back soon.

bundle.pieces: {count, plural, =0 {Empty bundle} one {# piece} other {# pieces}}
bundle.empty: No products in this bundle yet.
bundle.inquireNote: Want this set? Contact us for a quote and availability.
bundle.packageNote: Bundle price is the sum of the member products' prices.
bundle.waText: Hi, I'd like a quote and availability for the “{name}” bundle.

style.empty: No products in this style yet.

whereToBuy.title: Where to buy
whereToBuy.noChannelTitle: Want this? Ask us to source it
whereToBuy.noChannelBody: No retailer is listed yet — message us and we will help you find it or order it in.
whereToBuy.waText: Hi, I am interested in {name} ({url}). Could you share the price and availability?

authGate.title: Register — Free AR
authGate.subtitle: Keep viewing products in your space — free forever.
authGate.googleUnavailable: Google sign-in isn't enabled yet — please use email.
authGate.privacy: We only use your email to send product news and offers — never shared with third parties.
authGate.err_short_password: Password must be at least 6 characters
authGate.err_wrong_password: This email is already registered — wrong password
authGate.err_server: Something went wrong, please try again
